scripts.lint: (cd apps/bot && bun run lint) && (cd apps/leaderboard && bun run lint)
scripts.typecheck: (cd apps/bot && bun run typecheck) && (cd apps/leaderboard && bunx tsc --noEmit) && (cd apps/monitor && bun run typecheck)
scripts.test: bun test shared/__tests__/ && (cd apps/bot && bun test) && (cd apps/leaderboard && for f in src/__tests__/*.test.js; do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done) && (cd apps/monitor && bun run test)
